title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Yum! Brands India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Yum! Brands India
jsonLd.description:
Yum! Brands India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Yum! Brands India:
Yum! Brands India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
